source: https://zycrypto.com/grayscale-seeks-sec-nod-to-launch-first-ever-u-s-zcash-etf-amid-zecs-1000-rally/

data.description:

The conclusion was sent to Congress in a letter dated October 7, about three weeks before Donald Trump and Xi […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-alibaba-baidu-byd-aiding-chinas-military/

data.title: Ethereum Nears Tom Lee’s Ideal Buy Zone as Selling Pressure Builds — Here Is Why $2,500 Could Be the Turning Point
data.description:
As Ethereum approaches the price range that Tom Lee considers to be the optimal buying opportunity, there is a noticeable increase in selling pressure within the market. This situation leads to speculation that the price level of $2,500 could serve as a crucial turning point for the cryptocurrency, creating conditions that may influence future market movements and investor sentiment. Here’s an in-depth look at the factors contributing to this scenario and why many analysts believe that reaching this specific price point might signify a shift in momentum for Ethereum.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-nears-tom-lees-ideal-buy-zone-as-selling-pressure-builds-here-is-why-2500-could-be-the-turning-point/

data.title: South Korea sees first private company rocket launch as global space race gets serious
data.description:
South Korea achieved a new milestone in its space ambitions when the Nuri rocket lifted off at 1:13 a. m. local time from the Naro Space Center early Thursday morning, making it the first rocket launch led entirely by a private company in the country. The successful mission saw the launch of an Earth observation satellite […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-first-private-rocket-launch/

data.title: 31% of Russians report struggling to afford basic groceries this year
data.description:
Thirty-one percent of Russians say they can’t afford basic groceries anymore. That number, from real-time data tracked by SberIndex, is a flashing siren. Across Russia, the everyday cost of living is crushing people as the war drags into its fourth winter. This is the direct blowback of Vlad Putin’s decision to launch a full invasion […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/31-of-russians-report-struggling-to-afford-basic-groceries-this-year/

data.title: Global iPhone 17 sale surge could push Apple past Samsung for first time since 2011
data.description:
Apple is about to end a 14-year losing streak to Samsung. In 2025, the iPhone maker is on track to ship 243 million units, while Samsung is expected to push out 235 million, according to Counterpoint Research. That would give Apple a 19. 4% share of the global smartphone market. Samsung would slide to 18. 7%, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/iphone-17-could-push-apple-past-samsung/

data.title: Struggling to sleep? You’re not alone – How Bitcoin’s recent price crash is affecting other traders IRL
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent slide below $80,000 has triggered a wave of sleep disruption across the retail trading community, according to a new report from CEX. io. The flagship digital asset has since rebounded to about $88,000, but the roughly 31% drawdown from its recent peak left many investors monitoring prices through the night
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoins-recent-decline-fuels-sleep-nights-among-traders/

data.title: 440,000 fewer EVs predicted after UK imposes mileage tax on plug‑ins and EVs
data.description:
The UK government just confirmed it’s going after EV drivers’ wallets. Starting April 2028, electric vehicle and plug-in hybrid owners will pay a per-mile tax under new budget plans aimed at closing a future revenue gap. The Office for Budget Responsibility expects the change to erase about 440,000 EV sales over time, as fully electric […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/440000-fewer-evs-predicted-uk/
